'''Vaenrood''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vaenrood system/Legends|Vaenrood system]], which was located in the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Vaenrood|fought]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on Vaenrood.

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Vaenrood<ref name="TDC" /> was located in the [[Vaenrood system/Legends|system of the same name]] in the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> An area of the planet was [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]].<ref name="TDC" />

==History==
[[File:Darrynthyte.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Darryn Thyte fought at Vaenrood, where he suffered injuries in battle.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before their [[DarkStryder Campaign|campaign]] to [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|oust]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] from [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] on the planet [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Vaenrood|battled]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on Vaenrood. New Republic ground [[Soldier/Legends|forces]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] were deployed to the planet; one of the X-wings was [[Pilot/Legends|flown]] by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Darryn Thyte]].<ref name="TDC" />

During the battle, New Republic ground troops covered by X-wing air support engaged Imperial units supported by [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] in a mountainous area. As the engagement unfolded, Lieutenant Thyte's X-wing was clipped by artillery fire, causing the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] to crash. Thyte survived the impact, but the canopy of his X-wing buckled and snapped, shearing off most of his right [[Limb/Legends|arm]] above the elbow. [[Medic/Legends|Medics]] replaced the arm with a clunky [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] prosthesis, which was the best available at the time. Following the crash, Thyte was removed from active flight duty.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vaenrood was first mentioned in the short story "[[The Saga Begins]]" by [[Timothy Zahn]], published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> Vaenrood is further elaborated on in Lieutenant Darren Thyte's character biography.<ref name="TDC" />
